title: momordica subangulata
intro: Momordica subangulata is a tropical plant species belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family, commonly known as the bitter melon or wild bitter gourd. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Momordica subangulata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Momordica subangulata include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
